title: Audio briefings in Confluence can now be opted out of and are marked with a lozenge
description: We've added an opt-out functionality for the Audio briefing feature in Confluence, so admins can choose to opt-out of it if they prefer. You can do this by turning off the Beta features toggle in Atlassian Administration. We've also added a Labs lozenge next to the Audio briefing feature in Confluence. This lozenge lets users know that it's a Beta feature and uses AI. To opt-out of Beta features, such as the Audio briefing feature: Go to Atlassian Administration. Select your organization if you
